summary: Difference a before and after image into a per-pixel absolute-difference field and a report (max / mean / RMS error, changed-pixel count and bounds) in an explicit comparison space (encoded or decoded-linear). Identical inputs yield a zero diff with empty changed bounds.

inputs.name: before
inputs.doc: The reference image the change is measured against.

inputs.name: after
inputs.doc: The edited image whose change from `before` is measured.

outputs.name: diff
outputs.doc: The per-pixel, per-channel absolute-difference field |after − before| (the evidence heatmap), retyped raw-linear material.

outputs.name: report
outputs.doc: The difference report: per-channel stats plus max / mean / RMS error, changed-pixel count and bounds.

params.name: comparison_space
params.doc: The space the pair is compared in: `encoded` (stored samples) or `decoded-linear` (sRGB-decoded to linear light first).

params.name: threshold
params.doc: The absolute error a pixel must strictly exceed to count as changed (drives changed_count / changed_bounds).
